transcription.text: it's so nice to have us and it's nice to know that your phone comes complete with an old-fashioned girl who has good old-fashioned ideas about courtesy and customer service she is the southwestern bell service representative in our business office who's assigned to your number and she's there to answer questions and lend a helping hand whenever you need it i'd like to order a wall phone from my kitchen i've got a question about my bill i've changed my mind about the color of my extension phone do you have a science film for my scout troop southwestern bell is planning communications for the year 2000 but our plans still include lots of old-fashioned girls we may be the only phone company in town but we try not to act like it you
